'''鈭歬-h-r''' ('''kakahar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:veal|veal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-h-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:veal|veal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-h-r
|-
! Lemma
| kakahar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikahar|thikahar]] || [[word:jikahar|jikahar]] || [[word:shikahar|shikahar]] || [[word:kikahar|kikahar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukahar|thuthukahar]] || [[word:jujukahar|jujukahar]] || [[word:shushukahar|shushukahar]] || [[word:kukukahar|kukukahar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukahar|thukahar]] || [[word:jukahar|jukahar]] || [[word:shukahar|shukahar]] || [[word:kukahar|kukahar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukahar|thukahar]] || [[word:jukahar|jukahar]] || [[word:shukahar|shukahar]] || [[word:kukahar|kukahar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekahar|thekahar]] || [[word:jekahar|jekahar]] || [[word:shekahar|shekahar]] || [[word:kekahar|kekahar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokahar|thothokahar]] || [[word:jojokahar|jojokahar]] || [[word:shoshokahar|shoshokahar]] || [[word:kokokahar|kokokahar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokahar|thokahar]] || [[word:jokahar|jokahar]] || [[word:shokahar|shokahar]] || [[word:kokahar|kokahar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokahar|thokahar]] || [[word:jokahar|jokahar]] || [[word:shokahar|shokahar]] || [[word:kokahar|kokahar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kahar|th忙kahar]] || [[word:j忙kahar|j忙kahar]] || [[word:sh忙kahar|sh忙kahar]] || [[word:k忙kahar|k忙kahar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakahar|thathakahar]] || [[word:jajakahar|jajakahar]] || [[word:shashakahar|shashakahar]] || [[word:kakakahar|kakakahar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakahar|thakahar]] || [[word:jakahar|jakahar]] || [[word:shakahar|shakahar]] || [[word:kakahar|kakahar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakahar|thakahar]] || [[word:jakahar|jakahar]] || [[word:shakahar|shakahar]] || [[word:kakahar|kakahar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakahar|shakahar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakahar|goshakahar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakahar|gokishakahar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakaharn眉|shakaharn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakaharnkn眉|goshakaharnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakaharn眉|gokishakaharn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakaharsh毛|shakaharsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakaharnksh毛|goshakaharnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakaharsh毛|gokishakaharsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakaharo|shakaharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakaharnkro|goshakaharnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakaharo|gokishakaharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakaharmu|shakaharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakaharnkmu|goshakaharnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakaharmu|gokishakaharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakaharsher|shakaharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakaharnksher|goshakaharnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakaharsher|gokishakaharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakaharng|shakaharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakaharnkng|goshakaharnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakaharng|gokishakaharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakaharya|shakaharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakaharnkya|goshakaharnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakaharya|gokishakaharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakaharyam|shakaharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakaharnkyam|goshakaharnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakaharyam|gokishakaharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakaharn眉sh毛|shakaharn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakaharnkn眉sh毛|goshakaharnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakaharn眉sh毛|gokishakaharn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakaharn眉ro|shakaharn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakaharnkn眉ro|goshakaharnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakaharn眉ro|gokishakaharn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakaharn眉mu|shakaharn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakaharnkn眉mu|goshakaharnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakaharn眉mu|gokishakaharn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakaharsh毛n眉|shakaharsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakaharnksh毛n眉|goshakaharnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakaharsh毛n眉|gokishakaharsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakaharsh毛ro|shakaharsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakaharnksh毛ro|goshakaharnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakaharsh毛ro|gokishakaharsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakaharsh毛mu|shakaharsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakaharnksh毛mu|goshakaharnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakaharsh毛mu|gokishakaharsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakaharon眉|shakaharon眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakaharnkron眉|goshakaharnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakaharon眉|gokishakaharon眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakaharosh毛|shakaharosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakaharnkrosh毛|goshakaharnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakaharosh毛|gokishakaharosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakaharomu|shakaharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakaharnkromu|goshakaharnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakaharomu|gokishakaharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakaharmun眉|shakaharmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakaharnkmun眉|goshakaharnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakaharmun眉|gokishakaharmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakaharmush毛|shakaharmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakaharnkmush毛|goshakaharnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakaharmush毛|gokishakaharmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakaharmuro|shakaharmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakaharnkmuro|goshakaharnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakaharmuro|gokishakaharmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
